messages.content: NWA is planning to relocate the Campus to Zaman Town which is the posh area of Korangi and all branded and non branded schools were located there because of paying pocket. rearrange the sentence
Due to the high cost of living in Zaman Town, many branded and non-branded schools have been established there, and therefore NWA is planning to relocate their campus to this posh area of Korangi.
•	Orientation session with the parents of The Educators was arranged by the NWA, which was conducted by the Academic team as per the request of NWA. rearrange the sentence
As per the request of NWA, the Academic team arranged an orientation session with the parents of The Educators.
Building board was installed and artwork is provided as per the size required by the NWA.  rearrange the sentence
The artwork was provided as per the size required by NWA, and the building board was installed accordingly.
They placed the order of 1000 solved model papers for the support of Matric Students which were distributed in nearby The Educators and other schools of the vicinity. rearrange the sentence
For the support of Matric Students, they placed an order of 1000 solved model papers which were distributed in nearby The Educators and other schools of the vicinity.
Flyers artwork was provided, 5500 flyers were printed from which 3500 flyers were distributed in the vicinity. rearrange the sentence
The artwork for the flyers was provided, and 5500 flyers were printed, out of which 3500 were distributed in the vicinity.
As per the request of NWA IBS Portal ID was generated and a domain email was also provided.
A domain email was provided, and an IBS Portal ID was generated as per the request of NWA.

It is also suggested NWA to acquire a hoarding on the main road as the campus is inside the society therefore, it is necessary to acquire the hoarding which will attract the attention of the people passing by
It is suggested that NWA should acquire a hoarding on the main road as the campus is inside the society. This is necessary in order to attract the attention of people passing by.
Currently the Principal of TE SAV Campus is conducting the interviews for the admission officer and principal but nobody has been finalized yet
The interviews for the admission officer and principal are currently being conducted by the Principal of TE SAV Campus, but so far nobody has been finalized for the positions.
The video shoot of the campus was arranged by the HO marketing team to promote the campus on different platforms of social media
The HO marketing team arranged for a video shoot of the campus in order to promote it on different social media platforms.
Hoarding artwork was provided size 10x20 which was already acquired for a month by NWA.
The artwork for the hoarding in size 10x20 was provided, and it has already been acquired by NWA for a month.
It is suggested that NWA should acquire a hoarding on the roundabout which is hardly 1 km away from the campus. It is necessary in order to attract the attention of people passing by.
It is suggested that NWA should acquire a hoarding on the roundabout which is hardly 1 km away from the campus. This is necessary in order to attract the attention of people passing by.
